title: OASIS 3.0.15
release_notes:
FIXES

· SWIFT OAS generation removes Bad Request examples and sandbox extensions from SWIFT outputs, including API Portal-ready mode.

NEW FEATURES

· Preferences include configurable SWIFT server entries by service.

· Default SWIFT server entries are provided for B2B, CGS, CGS-DKK, COR, FPAD, R2P, RT1, and SCT.

· Template Metadata includes Service selection for Legacy Template Converter and Create Template from OAS; when saved, the selected Service is reused with the other metadata.

· Generated templates include the selected SWIFT server rows in $index.xlsx.

· OAS generation can detect templates without SWIFT server rows and add them automatically after Service selection.
